metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for developer productivity.

plugins.name: repo-to-notebooklm
plugins.description: Converts a code repository into a single readable document that can be uploaded to NotebookLM for AI-powered podcast generation and Q&A.

plugins.name: repo-setup
plugins.description: Bootstrap a freshly cloned repository: read docs, detect the stack, install dependencies, configure environment, auto-generate non-secret values, and verify the project runs.
